task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Menu Planning Resources' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmark manager, bookmark toolbar, or sidebar showing a folder exactly named 'Menu Planning Resources'.

task_completion.description: Verify the bookmark folder contains at least 5 bookmarks from the required USDA domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of the 'Menu Planning Resources' folder showing at least 5 saved pages, with URLs or titles indicating they are from fns.usda.gov and fdc.nal.usda.gov.

task_completion.description: Verify that a file named weekly_menu_plan.json is created in the ~/Documents/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing weekly_menu_plan.json inside the Documents folder, or a text editor showing the file open with the path /home/ga/Documents/weekly_menu_plan.json.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains a 5-day menu (Monday-Friday).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor displaying the JSON file with top-level keys for 'monday', 'tuesday', 'wednesday', 'thursday', and 'friday'.

task_completion.description: Verify that each day's menu includes the required meal components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing the JSON structure with the keys 'main_dish', 'side', 'vegetable', 'fruit', 'milk', and 'total_calories' nested under each day.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON includes at least 5 distinct food items with nutritional data and meets USDA calorie requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing distinct food names with 'calories' and 'protein_g' values, and a 'total_calories' value between 550 and 850 for each day.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used the Firefox browser to research the USDA websites.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Firefox open and navigated to fns.usda.gov or fdc.nal.usda.gov, rather than the agent hallucinating the data.

integrity.description: Ensure the bookmarks were created via the browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing interaction with the Firefox bookmark manager (Library window), bookmark sidebar, or the bookmark star dialog.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a text editor to create and edit the JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a graphical text editor (e.g., gedit, VS Code) or terminal-based editor (e.g., nano, vim) actively being used to write the JSON, rather than a single terminal command like echo or curl.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required domains for bookmarks: fdc.nal.usda.gov and fns.usda.gov. Required bookmark folder name: 'Menu Planning Resources'. Minimum bookmarks required: 5. Output file path: /home/ga/Documents/weekly_menu_plan.json. Required JSON components per day: main_dish, side, vegetable, fruit, milk. The daily total_calories must be within the official USDA range of 550-850 kcal.
